description:
You are a senior frontend engineer.

Project stack:
- Next.js 16 (App Router)
- React 19
- TypeScript
- shadcn/ui
- @tanstack/react-query v5
- axios
- react-hook-form
- zod
- sonner (toast)

==================================================
TASK: CREATE FULL BLOG MANAGEMENT UI
==================================================

BACKEND API AVAILABLE:

GET    /blogs?page=1&limit=10&search=abc
GET    /blogs/:id
POST   /blogs
PUT    /blogs/:id
DELETE /blogs/:id

Response format for list:

{
  data: Blog[],
  pagination: {
    total,
    page,
    limit,
    totalPages,
    hasNextPage,
    hasPrevPage
  }
}

==================================================
FEATURE REQUIREMENTS
==================================================

Create route:
app/dashboard/blogs/page.tsx

Features:
- Blog list table
- Search input with 300ms debounce
- Pagination
- Create blog
- Edit blog
- Delete blog (with confirm dialog)
- Image thumbnail in table
- Loading state
- Empty state
- Toast notifications

==================================================
STRUCTURE
==================================================

app/dashboard/blogs/
  page.tsx
  components/
    BlogTable.tsx
    BlogForm.tsx
    BlogDialog.tsx

lib/api/blog.api.ts
types/blog.type.ts

==================================================
IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS
==================================================

1) React Query v5:
- useQuery for list
- useMutation for create/update/delete
- invalidate queries properly

2) Axios base instance

3) react-hook-form + zod:

const blogSchema = z.object({
  title: z.string().min(1, "Title is required"),
  description: z.string().min(1, "Description is required"),
  image: z.string().optional()
})

4) Use shadcn:
- Table
- Input
- Button
- Dialog
- AlertDialog (delete confirm)
- Pagination component

5) Show image preview in table (small thumbnail)

6) Must use TypeScript properly.

7) Must not skip any file.

Generate full working code.
No pseudo code.
